creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #8)

Finished the build I've started before sleep was successful with
 *Workaround in /etc/make.conf is commented out.
 *LTO=off
on main.

Didn't uploaded the log, though, but base clang14 seems to be used.

Still confusing why my previous update of editors/libreoffice at git b305ea3361859bddd115ea9748fb89fbc85f20a8 was successful with same configuration I've bitten this time thogh, I've edited the subject.

At least, LTO option should imply dependency to proper devel/llvm*.
13 would be a good candidate, but not sure 10 through 12 are OK, too or not.
